name: RIVERVIEW BANCORP INC
summary: Riverview Bancorp, Inc. is a Washington-based bank holding company for Riverview Bank, a state-chartered commercial bank. It attracts deposits and originates commercial business, commercial real estate, multi-family, construction, residential real estate, and consumer loans in its primary market area of Clark, Klickitat, and Skamania counties (WA) and Multnomah, Washington, and Marion counties (OR). Subsidiaries include Riverview Trust Company, offering trust, asset management, and brokerage services, and Riverview Services, acting as trustee for mortgage deeds of trust.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Loans to businesses and professionals in the primary market area.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial properties in the primary market area.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: One-to-four family and multi-family real estate mortgage loans.

products.name: Real Estate Construction Loans
products.description: Loans for land and real estate construction projects.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Various consumer lending products offered through Riverview Bank.

products.name: Trust and Asset Management Services
products.description: Full-service trust, asset management, and brokerage via Riverview Trust Company.

products.name: Riverview Mortgage
products.description: Mortgage broker division originating loans for various mortgage companies in the Vancouver/Portland area.

products.name: Deposit Products
products.description: Deposit accounts attracted from the general public to fund lending activities.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines
partnerships.description: Riverview Bank is a member of FHLB Des Moines, one of 11 regional banks in the FHLB System.
